de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator

Packages that use OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml
This package provides the functionalities of parsing JML comments into KeY constructs.

    OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator
    Enumeration of all arithmetic operators which can be overloaded.

    The collection of those operators whose result is expected to be boolean.
